title: January 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 1''' is the first day of the calendar year. 364 days (365 in leap years) remain in the year.</noinclude>

*[[1958]] - [[Kipsang Rotich]] is born
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Angela Harry]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Hal Fowler]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Tim Lebbon]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Navin Chowdhry]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Rebecca Jackson Mendoza]] is born.
*[[1980]] – ''[[The Second Kessel Run]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1986]] – [[Anna Brewster]] is born.
*[[1989]] – ''[[Battle for Endor]]'' released.
*[[1990]] – [[Alaïs Lawson]] is born.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' published.
*1993 – [[Classic Star Wars 6|''Classic Star Wars'' 6]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 2|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 2]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth]]'' published.
*1996 – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' published.
*1996 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 6|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 6]] published.
*1996 – ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' published.
*1996 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]] published.
*1996 – ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' published.
*1997 –''[[Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive]]'' and ''[[Galaxy of Fear: City of the Dead]]'' published.
*1997 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' trade paperback]] published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 15|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 15]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars: Droids: Rebellion]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shards of Alderaan]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]'' published.
*1998 – [[Star Wars Kids (1997) 5|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 5]] released.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 17: Darth Vader's Return]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 51|''Star Wars Insider'' 51]] is published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 80|''Star Wars Insider'' 80]] is published.
*[[2007]] – The celebration of the thirtieth anniversary of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']] begins with the [[Wikipedia:Tournament of Roses Parade|Tournament of Roses Parade]], which included [[George Lucas]] as Grand Marshall and two ''Star Wars''-themed floats.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 98|''Star Wars Insider'' 98]] is published.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Insider 106|''Star Wars Insider'' 106]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Grievous Intrigue]]" and "[[The Deserter]]" air on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2010 – ''[[Rebel Force: Trapped]]'' published.
*2010 – [[Star Wars Insider 115|''Star Wars Insider'' 115]] published.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars: Heroes]]'' released.
*[[2011]] ‐ ''[[Watch out for the Wookiee!]]'' released.
*[[2012]] – [[Bob Anderson]] dies.
*2012 – ''[[The Wrath of Darth Maul]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace 3D Storybook]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Darth Maul's Mission]]'' published.
*2012 – [[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace (book)|''LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace'']] published.
*2012 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Anakin: Space Pilot]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Darth Maul: Shadow Conspiracy]]'' published.
*2013 – ''[[Scoundrels]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 1|''Star Wars'' (2020) 1]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Ahsoka 7|''Ahsoka'' 7]] published.
*? – [[Jennifer Hale]] is born.
<noinclude>
